goal: Explore how usage-based coding agents change pilot design, budgeting, workflow repeatability, and team-level trust in agentic coding.
seed_questions: Does usage-based pricing encourage useful experimentation or create underuse on uncertain exploratory tasks?
Which shared coding workflows make team adoption durable rather than dependent on a few power users?

seed_definitions.name: cost-visible agent workflow
seed_definitions.meaning: A coding workflow where users can see and react to the resource cost of agent actions while they work.

seed_definitions.name: durable adoption
seed_definitions.meaning: Team usage that remains stable beyond an initial pilot because workflows, incentives, and governance support it.
